source_description: Strategic fork: should bimaaji ship an MCP server, and if so, in what shape? Deferred from #1387 as #1463. Three options on the table: (1) keep bimaaji PHP-only and close #1463 with conviction; (2) extend the existing packages/mcp/ surface to expose bimaaji's graph operations as MCP tools (no Node sidecar); (3) restore a separate Node-based MCP server with a corrected install path. The previous attempt (Node mcp/ subdirectory + composer bimaaji-mcp-install) never reached consumers reliably and was removed. This mission is a research-style brainstorm whose deliverable is a written decision + scoped follow-up missions if applicable, not code.
